questions.question: Explain the key difference between Hadoop and traditional Relational Database Management Systems (RDBMS) in terms of data storage and management. Provide at least one example to support your answer.
Compare the scalability of Hadoop with RDBMS. How do Hadoop's architecture and distributed processing capabilities enable it to handle large volumes of data?
What is the main reason why Hadoop was chosen over RDBMS for Big Data analytics? Provide a brief justification for your answer.
